category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison — China export to Botswana.

title.en: China-to-Botswana EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入博茨瓦纳：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入波札那：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China EV charger documentation against Botswana BOBS / BERA / BPC requirements, IEC 61851 safety and EMC standards, IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 connector expectations for the Southern Africa IEC ecosystem, BPC grid-connection and BERA licensing requirements, OCPP interoperability, high-ambient and dust design factors, and China GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与博茨瓦纳BOBS / BERA / BPC要求、IEC 61851安全及EMC标准、南部非洲IEC体系下的IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口预期、BPC并网及BERA许可要求、OCPP互操作、高温高尘设计因素，以及中国GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234基线的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與波札那BOBS / BERA / BPC要求、IEC 61851安全及EMC標準、南部非洲IEC體系下的IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口預期、BPC併網及BERA許可要求、OCPP互操作、高溫高塵設計因素，以及中國GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234基線的差距對照。

answer_first.en: For China-made EV chargers entering Botswana, the confirmed practical gaps are: connector hardware redesign from GB/T 20234 to IEC 62196 Type 2 (AC) / CCS2 (DC), since Botswana follows the Southern Africa IEC 62196 ecosystem and GB/T connectors are physically incompatible with vehicles deployed in the region; IEC 61851-based safety and EMC evidence required under the BOBS / BERA conformity framework (GB/T 18487 test reports alone are not a substitute without accredited IEC 61851 evidence); thermal derating and dust-ingress protection (IP55 or IP65, IK10) for Botswana's high-ambient (35–40 °C regular, above 40 °C peak), high-dust, high-UV outdoor environment; BPC grid-connection and load-addition approval for all grid-connected installations; BERA licensing or notification depending on installation type and capacity; and OCPP back-office readiness for networked chargers. Botswana's grid is 230 V / 400 V, 50 Hz, close to but not identical to China's 220 V / 380 V baseline — input-voltage range must be confirmed. Botswana's EV market is nascent as of 2026; no published national EV charging rollout programme with binding targets, no BPC-specific EV charging tariff, and no dedicated EVSE national standard were confirmed from official sources at 2026-06-14. A mandatory BOBS CoC route specific to EV chargers could not be confirmed — exporters should verify with BOBS and the local importer before shipment.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造电动汽车充电桩进入博茨瓦纳时，已确认的实务差距包括：将接口硬件从GB/T 20234改为IEC 62196 Type 2（交流）/ CCS2（直流），因博茨瓦纳遵循南部非洲IEC 62196体系，GB/T接口与该地区部署的车辆在物理上不兼容；BOBS / BERA合格评定框架要求的IEC 61851安全及EMC证据（单独的GB/T 18487测试报告在未提供IEC 61851认可证据的情况下不可替代）；针对博茨瓦纳高温（通常35—40°C，峰值超40°C）、高沙尘、高紫外线室外环境的热降额和防尘侵入保护（IP55或IP65、IK10）；所有并网安装须获BPC并网和增容审批；根据安装类型和容量须完成BERA许可或备案；联网充电桩须具备OCPP后台就绪能力。博茨瓦纳电网为230 V / 400 V、50 Hz，与中国220 V / 380 V基线接近但不完全相同——须确认输入电压范围。截至2026年，博茨瓦纳电动汽车市场尚处于起步阶段；截至2026年6月14日，未能从官方来源确认具有约束性目标的国家电动汽车充电普及计划、BPC专项电动汽车充电电价及专用EVSE国家标准。适用于电动汽车充电桩的BOBS强制CoC路径亦未能确认——出口商在出货前应向BOBS和当地进口商核实。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造電動汽車充電樁進入波札那時，已確認的實務差距包括：將接口硬體從GB/T 20234改為IEC 62196 Type 2（交流）/ CCS2（直流），因波札那遵循南部非洲IEC 62196體系，GB/T接口與該地區部署的車輛在物理上不兼容；BOBS / BERA合格評定框架要求的IEC 61851安全及EMC證據（單獨的GB/T 18487測試報告在未提供IEC 61851認可證據的情況下不可替代）；針對波札那高溫（通常35—40°C，峰值超40°C）、高沙塵、高紫外線室外環境的熱降額和防塵侵入保護（IP55或IP65、IK10）；所有併網安裝須獲BPC併網和增容審批；根據安裝類型和容量須完成BERA許可或備案；聯網充電樁須具備OCPP後台就緒能力。波札那電網為230 V / 400 V、50 Hz，與中國220 V / 380 V基線接近但不完全相同——須確認輸入電壓範圍。截至2026年，波札那電動汽車市場尚處於起步階段；截至2026年6月14日，未能從官方來源確認具有約束性目標的國家電動汽車充電普及計劃、BPC專項電動汽車充電電價及專用EVSE國家標準。適用於電動汽車充電樁的BOBS強制CoC路徑亦未能確認——出口商在出貨前應向BOBS和當地進口商核實。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, BOBS scope determination, BERA licensing approval, BPC grid-connection approval, electrical-installation design, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, network operators, and installers should verify current Botswana conformity assessment rules, BPC grid-connection requirements, BERA licensing obligations, IEC standard editions, and installation rules with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、BOBS适用范围裁定、BERA许可批准、BPC并网审批、电气安装设计、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、网络运营商和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验现行博茨瓦纳合格评定规则、BPC并网要求、BERA许可义务、IEC标准版本及安装规则。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、BOBS適用範圍裁定、BERA許可批准、BPC併網審批、電氣安裝設計、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、網絡運營商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行波札那合格評定規則、BPC併網要求、BERA許可義務、IEC標準版本及安裝規則。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, utility, customs authority, electrical-installation authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
